hero.title: Redefining how true learning happens.
hero.subtitle: In a world that rewards memorized answers, Montola School builds curious minds. We don't just teach the How — we teach every student to ask Why.

free.title: Try for Free
free.subtitle: Our free resources represent how we build our contents for students.

classes.title: Available Classes
classes.subtitle: Select a Class you want to explore

valueProps.descriptionPart1: Too many students in the Chittagong Hill Tracts are falling behind — not because they lack ability, but because the system was never built for them. Montola School exists to change that —
valueProps.descriptionPart2: redefining how true learning happens in the hills.

why.title: Start With Why
why.desc: Instead of just teaching students what the answer is, we guide them to see why that answer is the only logical conclusion.

personalized.title: Personalized learning
personalized.desc: Because everyone learns differently, teaching works best when it is made just for you.

reciprocal.title: Reciprocal teaching
reciprocal.desc: When you have to explain a concept to someone else, your brain organizes the information more clearly, making the lesson much harder to forget.

row1.left: Asks: "Will this be on the exam?"
row1.right: Asks: "How does this connect to what we learned yesterday?"

row2.left: Waits for the teacher to start speaking.
row2.right: Interrupts with a "Why" before the teacher finishes.

row3.left: Memorizes the steps to solve a problem.
row3.right: Can explain why a different step wouldn't work.
